execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut current = ""
mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  if is_ws
    if string.len(current) > 0
      if first
        out = "#{current} #{current}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{current} #{current}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(current) > 0
  if first
    out = "#{current} #{current}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{current} #{current}"
  end
end

println(out)
